title: Incorrect permissions for n8n settings file
symptom: n8n logs a warning indicating that the permissions for the settings file are too wide, which may lead to security issues.
applies_when: Running n8n in a Docker container
Settings file permissions are not correctly set
root_cause: The permissions for the n8n settings file are set too broadly (0644), which can pose a security risk. n8n requires stricter permissions to ensure that sensitive configuration data is not accessible to unauthorized users.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_ENFORCE_SETTINGS_FILE_PERMISSIONS to true
Restart the n8n service to enforce the correct permissions
agent_instruction: Set N8N_ENFORCE_SETTINGS_FILE_PERMISSIONS to true and restart n8n.
